content: Just as the educational definition of reflexion frames it as a metacognitive step that helps high school learners connect new input to existing knowledge to correct misunderstandings, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be redesigned to embed this explicit educational metacognitive structure, rather than only relying on contrast between inconsistent solution outputs. This structured reflexion framework borrowed from language education pedagogy can help LLMs retain generalized self-improvement patterns across tasks instead of only refining single outputs.
